records.question: Which people aged at least 31 graduated from Oklahoma and work for PetroChina, an Oil and gas company headquartered in China with sales exactly 310.1 billion and a market value of at least 294.7 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.sales_in_billion = 310.1 AND people.graduation_college = 'Oklahoma' AND company.market_value_in_billion >= 294.7 AND company.industry = 'Oil and gas' AND people.age >= 31 AND company.headquarters = 'China' AND company.name = 'PetroChina'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.People_ID
FROM people p
INNER JOIN employment e ON p.People_ID = e.People_ID
INNER JOIN company c ON e.Company_ID = c.Company_ID
WHERE p.Graduation_College = 'Oklahoma'
AND p.Age >= 31
AND c.Sales_in_Billion = 310.1
AND c.Market_Value_in_Billion >= 294.7
AND c.Industry = 'Oil and gas'
AND c.Headquarters = 'China'
AND c.Name = 'PetroChina'

records.question: What people named Darryl Kennedy who are 31 years old and from the United States have exactly 1 year of work experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
WHERE people.name = 'Darryl Kennedy' AND people.nationality = 'United States' AND employment.year_working = 1 AND people.age = 31
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.People_ID
FROM people p
INNER JOIN employment e ON p.People_ID = e.People_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Darryl Kennedy'
AND p.Nationality = 'United States'
AND p.Age = 31
AND e.Year_working = 1

records.question: Which people are from the United States and are at most 25 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.nationality = 'United States' AND people.age <= 25
records.pred_sql: SELECT people.People_ID FROM people WHERE people.Nationality = 'United States' AND people.Age <= 25

records.question: Which people graduated from Iowa and have been working for at least 3 years?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
WHERE employment.year_working >= 3 AND people.graduation_college = 'Iowa'

FROM people p
INNER JOIN employment e ON p.People_ID = e.People_ID
WHERE p.Graduation_College = 'Iowa'
AND e.Year_working >= 3
